prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **3.6L VR6 (CCTA/CDVC) engine** with a **Garrett GT2867R turbocharger** (0.86 A/R turbine housing, 58mm compressor wheel) running 18 psi of boost, paired with a **Vargas GC 3.6L VR6 in-house built short block** (forged Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ARP head studs) and a **Neuspeed VR6-specific intercooler kit** (5.5" core, 2.5" piping) to eliminate heat soak. Requires **034 Motorsport VR6 high-flow fuel pump** and **Bosch 440cc injectors** for stoichiometric AFR at peak power (~420whp/400wtq on 93 octane).

KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 8-position rebound, 12mm ride height range) with **034 Motorsport VR6-specific sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) and **H&R VR6-specific camber plates** (adjustable to -3.5° front camber) for optimal turn-in under high lateral G-forces. Polyurethane **Whiteline VR6 rear subframe bushings** to reduce torque steer and improve power delivery.

VR6-specific **Neuspeed Power Pulley Set** (lightweight crank, water pump, and alternator pulleys) to reduce parasitic drag, combined with a **034 Motorsport VR6 high-flow catalytic converter** (200-cell, 3" downpipe) and a **Supersprint VR6-specific cat-back exhaust** (76mm dual outlets, 304 stainless steel) for optimal scavenging without drone. **Southbend VR6-specific Stage 3 clutch** (organic/copper hybrid disc, 6-puck design) to handle increased torque.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny VW CC Pandem widebody kit** (custom-fitted for R-Line bumpers, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (extended 3" for aero balance) and **Maxton Design VR6-specific rear diffuser** (integrated dual exhaust cutouts). **OEM+ Euro-spec R-Line headlights** (LED projectors, smoked internals) with **Lux H8 V4 angel eyes** (6000K, 3000lm output) for aggressive illumination.

**Rotiform LAS-R 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** (staggered setup, 19x10.5 ET40 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires** (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear) for maximum mechanical grip. **H&R VR6-specific wheel spacers** (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the widebody arches. **Custom gloss black vinyl wrap** (3M 2080 Satin Black) with **red pinstriping** (1/8" width) along the beltline for a stealth OEM+ look.

**034 Motorsport VR6-specific engine cover** (carbon fiber, vented) with **custom billet aluminum oil cap** (engraved with "VR6" in red) and **Neuspeed VR6-specific strut tower brace** (polished aluminum, 3-point design). **Maxton Design VR6-specific side skirts** (extended rocker panels, aggressive lower profile) and **custom rear spoiler** (carbon fiber, 3" height, adjustable angle) for downforce at speed. **Interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats** (heated, Alcantara/leather, red stitching) with **custom VR6 embroidery** on headrests, paired with a **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, perforated leather, red stitching).
